dashboard_ui_scope: Strategy Chat drawer frontend UX and loading state only; no panels added or removed.

frontend_repairs.assistant_message_rendering: Assistant bubbles use whitespace-pre-wrap, leading-relaxed, and break-words so structured replies remain readable as plain text.
frontend_repairs.front_door_request_guard: sendChat returns immediately when the drawer is loading or chatRequestInFlight.current is true.
frontend_repairs.starter_chip_guard: Starter prompt chips are disabled and visually subdued while loading.
frontend_repairs.send_button_guard: Send remains disabled while loading or when the input is empty.
frontend_repairs.message_append_strategy: User, assistant, and error messages append through functional setChatMessages updates.
frontend_repairs.controlled_error_copy: Strategy Chat is not available right now. The dashboard data is unchanged.

production_smoke_plan: Confirm deployed bundle contains whitespace-pre-wrap or equivalent.
Confirm deployed bundle contains loading guard logic.
Optional one controlled Strategy Chat route smoke returns 200, ok true, reply present, mutation_performed false.
Manual browser retest: open dashboard, open chat, send one prompt, verify readable formatting, blocked duplicate submits, no stuck loading, no record mutation.
limits: No Stripe, payment, or access edits.
No confirmed action write flow edits.
